name: Move Wrench
description: Shift doors, trapdoors, and fence gates at sub-voxel precision with a wrench. Press F to pick a step size (1/2/4 voxels) in a chisel-style selector. Right-click a face to push the block away from that face; sneak + right-click to snap back to alignment. Paired (double) doors and two-tall doors move as a single group. Non-destructive — hitbox stays intact.
